Primary request: a full-screen vertical battle arena: enemy demon gate and crimson fog at the top, player jade command platform and immortal banners at the bottom, a clear middle battle line, Honghuang and Journey-to-the-West Chinese mythology mood. Composition: vertical top-versus-bottom battlefield for a tower defense card game; enemy side at the top, player side at the bottom, open combat space in the middle, clear readable lanes, rich 3D environment, no UI, no characters blocking the center. Camera: slightly top-down orthographic game view, landscape 16:9.
